mapper.sql: id, invocation_id, user_id, scenario, session_id, user_message_id, assistant_message_id, turn_id, request_id, connection_id, model_id, provider_type_snapshot, model_name_snapshot, connection_name_snapshot, owner_type_snapshot, instruction_profile_id, instruction_version_id, instruction_version_snapshot, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, duration_ms, logical_status, transport_status, error_category, error_summary, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into model_call_ledger(invocation_id,user_id,scenario,session_id,user_message_id,assistant_message_id,turn_id,request_id,connection_id,model_id,provider_type_snapshot,model_name_snapshot,connection_name_snapshot,owner_type_snapshot,instruction_profile_id,instruction_version_id,instruction_version_snapshot,input_tokens,output_tokens,total_tokens,duration_ms,logical_status,transport_status,error_category,error_summary,started_at,finished_at,created_at,updated_at) values(#{invocationId},#{userId},#{scenario},#{sessionId},#{userMessageId},#{assistantMessageId},#{turnId},#{requestId},#{connectionId},#{modelId},#{providerTypeSnapshot},#{modelNameSnapshot},#{connectionNameSnapshot},#{ownerTypeSnapshot},#{instructionProfileId},#{instructionVersionId},#{instructionVersionSnapshot},#{inputTokens},#{outputTokens},#{totalTokens},#{durationMs},#{logicalStatus},#{transportStatus},#{errorCategory},#{errorSummary},#{startedAt},#{finishedAt},#{createdAt},#{updatedAt}) on conflict (invocation_id) do nothing
mapper.update: update model_call_ledger set logical_status=#{logicalStatus}, transport_status=#{transportStatus}, input_tokens=#{inputTokens}, output_tokens=#{outputTokens}, total_tokens=#{totalTokens}, duration_ms=#{durationMs}, assistant_message_id=coalesce(#{assistantMessageId}, assistant_message_id), error_category=#{errorCategory}, error_summary=#{errorSummary}, finished_at=current_timestamp, updated_at=current_timestamp where invocation_id=#{invocationId} and logical_status='RUNNING' and transport_status='ACTIVE'
mapper.select: select from model_call_ledger where started_at<=#{cutoff} and ((logical_status='RUNNING' and transport_status='ACTIVE') or (logical_status in ('CANCEL_REQUESTED','TIMEOUT') and transport_status='DETACHED')) order by started_at, id
select from model_call_ledger where user_id=#{userId} and started_at>=#{startedAt} and started_at<#{endedAt} order by started_at desc, id desc
